steps.title: Use the given x-value
steps.content: The second equation is already $x=8$, so every possible solution must have $x=8$. Substitute $8$ into the other equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The ordered pair is $(8,9)$. Substituting it gives $4(8)-3(9)=32-27=5$, so it satisfies both equations. The result matches.
